props.ChoiceText: A client demanded harm, and what you did or refused to do taught you which kind of practitioner you meant to become.
props.ChoiceBio: Wax and pins taught you that folk magic becomes darkest when someone pays well enough.

0.TransitionText: Because wax and pins taught you that folk magic becomes darkest when someone pays well enough, village need and fear kept you in cunning work.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Cunning Folk, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because wax and pins taught you that folk magic becomes darkest when someone pays well enough, folk practice no longer felt deep enough, and you pressed deeper.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Occultist, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because wax and pins taught you that folk magic becomes darkest when someone pays well enough, whatever power you held could not protect you from loss and hardship.

1.TargetText: A fearful client with coin and a weak conscience remembers what they asked of you.
